name: Pretzels (Soft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water.
2. Add salt and sugar to the yeast mixture.
3. Gradually blend in the flour until a smooth dough forms.
4. Knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic.
5. Cut the dough into small pieces.
6. Roll each piece into a rope about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Twist the rope into a pretzel shape.
8. Place the pretzels on a paper-lined cookie sheet.
9. Brush the pretzels with beaten egg.
10. Sprinkle generously with course salt.
11. Bake at 425°F for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
